mission.title: cert-manager: ClusterIssuer Secrets and Challenges unable to find secret
mission.description: ClusterIssuer Secrets and Challenges unable to find secret. This issue affects 24+ users.

steps.title: Identify cert-manager troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your cert-manager deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cert-manager
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cert-manager -n cert-manager --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review cert-manager configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant cert-manager configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n cert-manager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cert-manager
kubectl get configmap -n cert-manager -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=cert-manager
```
> 📢 cert-manager v1.16.1 has the fix for this bug.

steps.title: Apply the fix for ClusterIssuer Secrets and Challenges unable to find secret
steps.description:
cert-manager v1.16.1 has the fix for this bug. 
 * https://github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager/releases/tag/v1.16.1
```yaml
E1007 06:31:50.878392       1 controller.go:157] "re-queuing item due to error processing" err="error getting route53 secret access key: secrets \"prod-route53-credentials-secret\" not found" logger="cert-manager.controller"
```

steps.title: Confirm ClusterIssuer Secrets and Challenges unable to… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cert-manager -n cert-manager --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
cert-manager v1.16.1 has the fix for this bug. 
 * https://github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager/releases/tag/v1.16.1
codeSnippets: E1007 06:31:50.878392       1 controller.go:157] "re-queuing item due to error processing" err="error getting route53 secret access key: secrets \"prod-route53-credentials-secret\" not found" logger="cert-manager.controller"

E1007 06:31:50.878392       1 controller.go:157] "re-queuing item due to error processing" err="error getting route53 secret access key: secrets \"prod-route53-credentials-secret\" not found in the namespace cert-manager" logger="cert-manager.controller"

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with cert-manager installed or the issue environment reproducible.
